values.description: JWT access token — auto-populated by Login request
JWT refresh token — auto-populated by Login request
Admin JWT access token — auto-populated by Admin Login request
Current user's MongoDB ID — auto-populated by Register or Login
Admin user's MongoDB ID — auto-populated by Admin Login
Current user's profile ID — auto-populated by Create Profile or Get My Profile
Another user's profile ID for interest/shortlist operations — auto-populated by Search Profiles
Interest document ID — auto-populated by Express Interest or Get Received Interests
Profile pending admin approval — auto-populated by Get Pending Profiles
User ID for block/unblock — auto-populated by List All Users
